eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Cass, MN; at 6:45 AM on AUG 22, 2019 Effective until 7:15 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a test from the Cass County Sheriff's Office. This is only a test. This is a test from the Cass County Sheriff's Office. This is only a test.
